mapper.sql: id, trans_type, trans_no, item_no, model_no, quantity, status, from_no, from_id, from_type, from_inventory_property_id, from_warehouse_code, from_inventory_type_code, from_ppl, from_project_code, from_group_customer_no, from_sales_info_no, from_customer_no, to_inventory_property_id, to_warehouse_code, to_inventory_type_code, to_ppl, to_project_code, to_group_customer_no, to_sales_info_no, to_customer_no, in_quantity, wms_dlv_date, finish_time, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, invoice_no, ship_qty, ship_date, trans_flag, from_inventory_id, from_associate_no, from_associate_no_item, from_associate_no_split, invoice_id
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.trans_order
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.trans_order (id, trans_type, trans_no, item_no, model_no, quantity, status, from_no, from_id, from_type, from_inventory_property_id, from_warehouse_code, from_inventory_type_code, from_ppl, from_project_code, from_group_customer_no, from_sales_info_no, from_customer_no, to_inventory_property_id, to_warehouse_code, to_inventory_type_code, to_ppl, trans_flag, from_inventory_id, from_associate_no, from_associate_no_item, from_associate_no_split, invoice_id) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{transType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, invoice_id,

mapper.update:
update dbo.trans_order
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
trans_type = #{record.transType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
trans_no = #{record.transNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
from_no = #{record.fromNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_id = #{record.fromId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
from_type = #{record.fromType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
from_inventory_property_id = #{record.fromInventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
from_warehouse_code = #{record.fromWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_inventory_type_code = #{record.fromInventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_ppl = #{record.fromPpl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_project_code = #{record.fromProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_group_customer_no = #{record.fromGroupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_sales_info_no = #{record.fromSalesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_customer_no = #{record.fromCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_inventory_property_id = #{record.toInventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
to_warehouse_code = #{record.toWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_inventory_type_code = #{record.toInventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_ppl = #{record.toPpl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_project_code = #{record.toProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_group_customer_no = #{record.toGroupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_sales_info_no = #{record.toSalesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_customer_no = #{record.toCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
in_quantity = #{record.inQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wms_dlv_date = #{record.wmsDlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
finish_time = #{record.finishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ship_qty = #{record.shipQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ship_date = #{record.shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
trans_flag = #{record.transFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
from_inventory_id = #{record.fromInventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
from_associate_no = #{record.fromAssociateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_associate_no_item = #{record.fromAssociateNoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
from_associate_no_split = #{record.fromAssociateNoSplit,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},

update dbo.trans_order
trans_type = #{transType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
trans_no = #{transNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
from_no = #{fromNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_id = #{fromId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
from_type = #{fromType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
from_inventory_property_id = #{fromInventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
from_warehouse_code = #{fromWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_inventory_type_code = #{fromInventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_ppl = #{fromPpl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_project_code = #{fromProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_group_customer_no = #{fromGroupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_sales_info_no = #{fromSalesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_customer_no = #{fromCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_inventory_property_id = #{toInventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
to_warehouse_code = #{toWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_inventory_type_code = #{toInventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_ppl = #{toPpl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_project_code = #{toProjectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_group_customer_no = #{toGroupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_sales_info_no = #{toSalesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
to_customer_no = #{toCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
in_quantity = #{inQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wms_dlv_date = #{wmsDlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
finish_time = #{finishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ship_qty = #{shipQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ship_date = #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
trans_flag = #{transFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
from_inventory_id = #{fromInventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
from_associate_no = #{fromAssociateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
from_associate_no_item = #{fromAssociateNoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
from_associate_no_split = #{fromAssociateNoSplit,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
